lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.
Poor condition.

Get ready to own a true gem! This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the assembly line. It has been meticulously maintained with zero flaws inside or out—truly a rare find for the discerning buyer who wants nothing but the best!

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering a practical and functional option for those prioritizing utility over aesthetics. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are in good working order, providing a dependable driving experience. However, the exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, minor paint fading on the hood, and a small dent on the passenger side door. The interior exhibits typical wear and tear, including some staining on the fabric seats and minor scuffs on the dashboard plastics. All major systems are operational, though the buyer should expect to replace the brake pads in the near future. It is a solid, honest car that is priced to reflect its current state and cosmetic needs.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents well with its original finish, showing only minor signs of use such as a few light stone chips on the front bumper and minor surface scratches typical for its age. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with all electronics, climate control, and interior features functioning as intended; there is some light wear on the driver's side seat bolster,

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but no significant damage. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well maintained.

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle represents the zenith of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, maintaining a showroom-standard aesthetic and peerless mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a unit of such singular quality and distinction, meticulously curated for the discerning collector.

Hey there! I’m absolutely thrilled to list my pride and joy—this car is in total showroom condition! It’s been pampered since day one and looks and drives like it’s never even touched the road. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless, you’ve found it. I’m so excited for its next owner to fall in love with it just like I did!

This collector-grade BMW M2 Competition features the S55 twin-turbocharged inline-six, delivering a linear torque curve and exceptional thermal efficiency. The chassis maintains its factory-spec torsional rigidity, paired with a precision 6-speed manual and an Active M Differential for optimal power distribution. Zero mechanical lash, pristine forged alloys, and a documented service history confirm its mechanical integrity. This is a turn-key performance machine for the purist seeking uncompromised driving dynamics
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Every inch of the factory-original paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, having been protected since day one in a climate-controlled environment and recently treated with a multi-layer professional ceramic coating. There are absolutely no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found across the entire body. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, the dashboard is pristine with no UV damage, and the original carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since new. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach. It has been maintained exclusively by factory-certified specialists with a comprehensive folder of service records documenting every scheduled maintenance and preventative inspection. The engine bay is meticulously clean, and the undercarriage is free of any debris or oxidation. Riding on brand-new, top-tier performance tires with immaculate alloy wheels that have never seen a curb, this car drives with the same precision and tightness as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a truly flawless, investment-grade vehicle.

We are pleased to present this vehicle in truly impeccable condition. Meticulously maintained to showroom standards, its exterior finish and interior appointments remain in a pristine, original state. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a specimen of unrivaled quality. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our highest standards of excellence, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new.

This exceptional vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous preservation, presented in showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile has been maintained to the highest standards, offering an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical profile. Discerning buyers will appreciate the pristine interior and flawless exterior finish, distinguishing this unit as a premier example of its lineage. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! 🚗 I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It's been meticulously cared for and drives like a dream. You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Presenting an investment-grade E92 M3, a definitive example of high-revving atmospheric performance. At its heart lies the S65 4.0-liter V8, featuring individual throttle bodies and a stratospheric 8,400 RPM redline, delivering linear power through a precision-calibrated 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission. This specimen is mechanically impeccable, having received preventative rod
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero scratches. Full service history. Clean title. Non-smoker.

Step into luxury with this impeccably maintained masterpiece. This car presents in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, reflecting the highest level of care and attention to detail. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip, scratch, or blemish. The alloy wheels are pristine, wrapped in premium performance tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the hand-stitched leather seats show no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and every digital interface and physical button functions exactly as intended. This vehicle has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never been exposed to harsh weather. Accompanied by a comprehensive, documented service history from certified technicians and including all original keys and manuals, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands a vehicle that looks and drives like it just left the factory floor.

We are proud to offer this superlative vehicle, presented in showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest automotive standards, this specimen exhibits no discernible wear, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade acquisition, this vehicle offers an unrivaled combination of mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained in a state of absolute preservation that challenges the distinction between pre-owned and showroom floor. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. An acquisition for those who demand nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and spotless. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It’s a total dream to drive and I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Available is a pristine 997.2 Carrera S, featuring the robust 3.8L DFI flat-six engine. This example boasts a factory-spec short-shifter and PASM sport suspension. The naturally aspirated power delivery remains linear up to the 7,400 RPM redline, with zero evidence of bore scoring. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, the chassis rigidity and hydraulic steering feedback are factory-fresh. Finished in Guards Red with a concours-grade interior, this is a turnkey investment for the discerning purist.
Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Dealer maintained. Showroom condition.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality masterpiece, meticulously maintained to satisfy even the most discerning collector. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or surface imperfections. Inside, the cabin feels as though it just rolled off the assembly line; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and taut, with zero signs of wear on the bolsters, carpets, or touchpoints. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history and a driving experience that remains as tight, quiet, and responsive as the day it was first delivered. Every electronic feature, from the advanced navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly pristine, investment-grade condition that has been garage-kept and pampered since day one.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in peerless showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits impeccable aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflecting a rigorous standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail has been preserved to ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that defines the pinnacle of its class.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards and offered in pristine showroom condition. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a machine that exhibits virtually no discernible wear. Every aspect, from the immaculate interior appointments to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a legacy of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the absolute precision expected of a factory-new delivery. This is a peerless example of automotive excellence, curated for those who demand the finest quality available on the market.

Hey there! I’m selling my pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in absolutely stunning shape. It has been pampered since day one and looks just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! You won't find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next big adventure. Come see it for yourself—I promise you won't be disappointed!

This collector-grade E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS for a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced, and the critical rod bearing service is fully documented. Suspension dynamics are enhanced by Bilstein PSS10 adjustable coilovers, paired with a GKN variable M-differential for optimal corner-exit traction. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, while the cooling system has been fully refreshed with a Stewart high-flow water pump. A turn-key performance icon for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero scratches or dents. Original paint. Smoke-free interior. Full service history included.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality masterpiece, meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with no chips or swirls, while the interior remains in 'wrapper' condition, boasting pristine leather and that signature new-car scent. Every mechanical component has been serviced ahead of schedule, ensuring a drive that is as smooth and responsive as the day it was manufactured. Complete with a full service history and all original keys, this car represents the absolute pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior cabin, reflects a history of meticulous care. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unparalleled ownership experience.
